text_block_list.text:
It's the day of the Debut race. 
As for Stay Gold…

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
Man～ I got something good. 
It was worth wandering around.

For some reason, she was strolling 
around the racecourse carrying a 
large bear print t-shirt, casually 
purchased along the way…

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text: Yeah. Getting ready and such isn't all that important ——

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
A journey is really about the detours you 
make along the way. Once you get used to 
that kind of atmosphere, performing well 
comes naturally.
choice_data_list: …If you say it like that, then I got it

text_block_list.text:
…Just like that, Stay Gold casually strolled 
around the racecourse, as much as time 
permitted.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
I've got a good grasp on where I am 
right now.
choice_data_list: $(scale 95)…First thing is to go enjoy your debut race!

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
——You're right. It's the first race of 
this journey… I'm gonna enjoy it to 
the fullest.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
Well then, I'm off. You enjoy yourself too, 
Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Racing Fan A
text_block_list.text:
Now then, I wonder what kind of horsegirls 
will debut today～…… oh ——

text_block_list.name: Racing Fan A
text_block_list.text: Ohhh, that girl is quite petite. She's got a bit of an aura but what do you think…?

text_block_list.name: Racing Fan B
text_block_list.text:
Well, there have already been plenty of 
successful petite horsegirls. Could this 
girl unexpectedly become one of them?

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
……Yeah, that's right. This is the air of 
the paddock.
